hero.title: Create QR Codes Instantly
hero.subtitle: Free, fast & fully customizable. Generate QR codes for links, text, WiFi, contacts and more.

types.title: Multiple QR Types
types.description: URLs, text, WiFi, phone, email, SMS, locations, events and contacts.

customization.title: Full Customization
customization.description: Colors, gradients, shapes, logos and styles to match your brand.

analytics.title: Optional Analytics
analytics.description: Track scans with short links. View geo data, browsers and click counts.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Self-hosted with configurable tracking. Your data stays on your server.

noAccount.title: No Account Needed
noAccount.description: Generate QR codes instantly without signing up.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Docker-based, fully configurable via environment variables.

style.title: Style Options
style.logoHint: Transparent PNG recommended. Max {ratio}% of QR area.
style.sizeHint: Only affects download resolution. Preview always uses a fixed size.
style.embedTargetLabel: Embed target link into QR image

tracking.title: Tracking & Short Link
tracking.enableHint: Creates a tracked short link with scan statistics.
tracking.statsHint: Share this link to view scan statistics.
tracking.activationWarning: This QR code already points to the tracking link, but it will only work after you activate it.
tracking.fillFieldsFirst: Enter the final target first. A draft tracking link is prepared automatically.
tracking.featureShortLink: Uses a short link instead of embedding the full target directly.
tracking.featureClicks: Counts scans/clicks for this QR code.
tracking.featureTimestamps: Stores scan timestamps for time-based statistics.
tracking.featureBrowser: Captures browser data for device insights.
tracking.featureUniqueVisitors: Can estimate unique visitors using hashed IPs.
tracking.featureExtendedPrivacy: Can show consent and redirect choice pages before forwarding.
tracking.noTrackingDirect: The final target is embedded directly in the QR code.
tracking.noTrackingPermanent: Works permanently even without a short-link database lookup.
tracking.noTrackingPrivacy: Best for privacy because no scan statistics are collected.
tracking.disabled: Tracking is disabled by the administrator.
tracking.unavailable: Tracking requires the analytics feature to be enabled.

preview.title: Preview
preview.empty: Configure your QR code to see a preview.
preview.scanWarning: This QR code may be hard to scan. Try reducing the logo size or simplifying styles.

export.title: Export
export.svgLogoHint: SVG download is only available when the logo is in SVG format.

stats.title: Scan Statistics
stats.notFound: Statistics not found. The link may be invalid or expired.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This privacy policy explains how {siteName} collects, uses and protects your data when you use our QR code generator service.

operator.title: Data Controller
operator.content: The data controller for this service is: {companyInfo}. For privacy inquiries, contact: {contactEmail}.

collection.title: Data We Collect
collection.content: By default, this service does not collect personal data. QR codes are generated directly in your browser. No account is required.

tracking.title: Scan Tracking
tracking.content: When scan tracking is enabled for a QR code, the following data may be collected when the short link is scanned:

items.timestamps: Date and time of each scan

tracking.ipNote: IP addresses are never stored in plain text. A one-way hash with a rotating salt is used for unique-visitor counting.

selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted Analytics
selfHosted.content: This instance uses self-hosted analytics. All tracking data is stored on this server and is not shared with third parties.

google.title: Google Analytics
google.content: This site uses Google Analytics to analyse website usage. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect anonymised data. For details, see Google's privacy policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy.

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare Web Analytics
cloudflare.content: This site uses Cloudflare Web Analytics, a privacy-first analytics service that does not use cookies or collect personal data. More info: https://www.cloudflare.com/web-analytics/.

api.title: Public API
api.content: This instance provides a public API. API requests may be logged for rate limiting and abuse prevention. Logs are retained for {retentionDays} days.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: This service uses only essential cookies for theme preference and language selection. No tracking cookies are set unless third-party analytics are enabled.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct or delete your personal data. Since QR code generation happens in your browser and tracking is optional, minimal data is stored. For data requests, contact: {contactEmail}.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Scan tracking data is retained for {retentionDays} days and then automatically deleted. QR codes without tracking are not stored on the server.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.notConfigured: Imprint information has not been configured. Please set the IMPRINT_* environment variables.

cookieConsent.message: This site uses cookies for analytics (Google Analytics / Cloudflare Web Analytics). Do you agree to their use?
